config.language.description: Language used in YoGit's own panels (rebase, diff, conflict resolution, log, commit). Does not affect command titles or notifications, which always follow VS Code's display language.
config.rebase.defaultOrder.description: Default display order for the interactive rebase panel. Can always be toggled from the panel itself.
config.rebase.defaultOrder.enum.oldestFi: Oldest commit on top (git's traditional order)
